expertise_area: Georgism and land value tax theory

key_insights.insight: Georgism targets unproductive rent-seeking by taxing unimproved land value, not buildings or human-made improvements.
key_insights.quote: Let's tax essentially monopolies and rent-seeking.

key_insights.insight: Georgism is genuinely pro-worker and pro-business, challenging the false dichotomy between capitalism and socialism.
key_insights.quote: We have this assumption that you either have to be pro-worker or pro-business, that you can't be both. And Georgeism is genuinely pro-worker and pro-business.

key_insights.insight: Land speculation explains why poverty persists despite technological progress, as rising land values capture productivity gains.
key_insights.quote: Why does poverty advance even when progress advances?... George answers that question in his book...

key_insights.insight: Virtual housing crises in online games mirror real-world land speculation, proving the issue is systemic, not accidental.
key_insights.quote: I started noticing this weird phenomenon in online multiplayer games going back 30 years repeatedly of virtual housing crises...

key_insights.insight: A severance tax on natural resource extraction (like Norway's oil tax) complements land value tax by targeting similar rent-seeking behavior.
key_insights.quote: Severance tax is a tax on the extraction of natural resources. Is what Norway does with their oil...

actionable_advice.advice: Implement split-rate property tax by setting building tax to zero while maintaining land value tax at revenue-neutral levels.
actionable_advice.how_to: Start in places like Texas... legalize split-rate property tax, thus retax buildings and land at separate rates, set the rate on buildings to zero, collect the same dollar amount of taxes.

actionable_advice.advice: After establishing land value tax, apply severance taxes to natural resources and other monopoly-like assets before considering income or capital taxes.
actionable_advice.how_to: After land value tax, you should do things like severance tax on natural resources and other taxes on other monopolies and rents.

actionable_advice.advice: Use land value tax revenue to replace regressive taxes or fund a universal basic income (citizens dividend) to address potential regressivity.
actionable_advice.how_to: It's up to you... whether you want to spend it on spending, whether you want to spend it on offsetting taxes, or whether you want to spend it on UBI.

contrarian_claims.claim: Georgism represents an abundance mindset, not scarcity, because sharing land unlocks unused productive potential.
contrarian_claims.context: Contrasts with the common belief that land inequality is inevitable due to fixed supply; argues that proper land sharing creates abundance.

contrarian_claims.claim: Most billionaires derive wealth from land/real estate (via banking/hedge funds), not innovation like Gates or Bezos.
contrarian_claims.context: Challenges the perception that tech innovators represent typical billionaires; states most billionaires are in finance tied to real estate.
